title: DNA Extraction for Illumina 16S rRNA
author: Vincent Young
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7kxhkxn

steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge the PowerMag Glass Bead plate to collect beads at the bottom of the well. In a clean hood, add a maximum of 0.25g or 250 uL of sample to the PowerMag Glass Bead plate and seal with mat. Reserve at least three wells in the bead plate for controls. Maximum number of samples per plate is 93. Clearly label plates with PI, Reference ID, and date.
Use these shipping directions to prepare the Bead plates for shipping (use the same instructions as PCR plates).
Send electronic plate map and shipment tracking information to msmblcore@umich.edu .

Ship on dry ice to: Attention: April Cockburn Mouse Metabolic Phenotyping Centers University of Michigan Medical School Internal Medicine/Infectious Diseases 1500 MSRB1 1150 W. Medical Center Drive Ann Arbor, MI 48109-5666 Please include reference ID on package documentation.
